title: Expiration of bond during military service; renewal
doc_html:
§134.  Expiration of bond during military service; renewal

When the notarial bond of a notary public expires during his term of military service, the notary shall have sixty days from the date of his discharge from military service in which to apply for a new bond.
doc_text:
§134.  Expiration of bond during military service; renewal
When the notarial bond of a notary public expires during his term of military service, the notary shall have sixty days from the date of his discharge from military service in which to apply for a new bond.
